context: Tests whether the agent selects semantically precise types across a mixed set of changes, avoids using 'chore' as a catch-all for build/refactor/style changes, uses scopes appropriately, and follows header formatting rules.

checklist.name: build for tooling updates
checklist.description: Change #2 (eslint/prettier upgrade) uses 'build' or 'style' type, NOT 'chore'

checklist.name: Appropriate type for script
checklist.description: Change #5 (migrate:rollback script) uses a semantically precise type such as 'build', 'feat', or 'chore' — if 'chore', there is no better-fitting type that applies

checklist.name: Imperative mood all five
checklist.description: All five headers use imperative mood ('add', 'upgrade', 'fix', 'update') not past tense

checklist.name: Header ≤ 72 chars all five
checklist.description: All five headers are 72 characters or fewer

checklist.name: No trailing periods
checklist.description: None of the five headers end with a period

checklist.name: Lowercase descriptions
checklist.description: All five description portions begin with a lowercase letter

checklist.name: No implementation details in headers
checklist.description: None of the five headers include specific implementation details (e.g. specific package version numbers, specific file names)
